title: 10 best herbal creams for boils
description: Lavandula angustifolia, also known as English lavender, creams helps with boils because of its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The active compounds, including linalool and linalyl acetate, work to reduce redness and swelling associated with boils. Additionally, the antiseptic properties of English lavender cream help to prevent bacterial infections from spreading and promote the healing of affected skin.
